name: greengrow
description: Heroku deploy glue: builds the React frontend during release and copies the bundle into backend/wwwroot so the ASP.NET Core app serves it as static files.

scripts.heroku-postbuild: cd frontend && npm ci && npm run build && mkdir -p ../backend/wwwroot && rm -rf ../backend/wwwroot/* && cp -r dist/* ../backend/wwwroot/
